title: rubus euchroanthus
intro: Rubus euchroanthus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rubus euchroanthus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Rubus euchroanthus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
